Name: Downtown Music Publishing Africa
Description: Downtown Music Publishing Africa is the largest independent music publisher in Africa. Established in 1996, DMP Africa represents the largest collection of African library music works ranging from traditional to contemporary sounds. We represent premier songwriters and composers whose works are utilized in major commercial campaigns, radio, film and television. Our professional team provide music supervision services to a wide array of major productions in South Africa and the continent. The business is also entrusted with  copyright management for major labels operating in Africa. Downtown Music Publishing Africa offers global publishing administration, distribution, monetisation and creative and sync services for clients across the continent. It is a subsidiary of Downtown Music Services - a modern global company with over 20 million music assets from countries across six continents.

Name: Faber Music
Description: Faber Music Ltd was founded in 1965, as a sister company to the distinguished book publisher Faber and Faber, for the principal purpose of publishing the music of Benjamin Britten. It now enjoys a world-wide reputation as one of the leading independent British publishers of classical, contemporary, educational and media music.

Name: Ethereal Cosmos Music
Description:
I am an advocate for fine arts and music programs. I believe that it is essential to education. Music is my speciality. I am also a composer, and I also write and sell music. 

Music benefits mathematics, because of the concrete and abstract function of music. It affects architecture because of how the sound travels through buildings, and how reverberation, ambience, resonance and kinds of sound affect those buildings due to the differences of the shape, size, and type of building. 

It benefits science due to the blending of different instruments and how they are performed. You will always hear something different. It benefits history, because it has always reflected world history. It benefits language arts because music is a universal language. It benefits physical education because it requires proper posture, air, technique, and kinesthetics for the instrument to be played correctly.

I compose music to make a difference to others. I compose all kinds of vocal and instrumental music. I write for common and uncommon solo instruments (with or without accompaniment). I write for brass, woodwind, and percussion chamber ensembles, and I also write electronic music. I also write for large ensembles, including choir, band, and orchestra. Many of my recent works include a biblical context to reach my music out to others. 

Although all of my works have the goal of inspiring others in one way or another, publishing and business have to be used in the right fashion along with composition in order for the music to be able to spread correctly. I'm not as experienced when it comes to publishing, business, production, and the other side of the music industry, but just like composing, I will always aspire to learn more and do better. As of right now, the publishing of the compositions will be digital when the production starts. I will always do my best to satisfy my customers, no matter if it is within composition, publishing, or any kind of service within the music industry.

Name: EL VUELO DEL NAVEGANTE PIANO
Description:
Mi nombre es Sergio Ruiz Valle, pianista y compositor bajo el nombre artístico “El Vuelo del Navegante”, y me encantaría colaborar con ustedes aportando un toque de elegancia y distinción a sus cenas o eventos especiales mediante música en vivo con piano.
 
Actualmente actúo de forma habitual en restaurantes y hoteles de alto nivel de la zona de Cádiz, Málaga, Sevilla y Gibraltar. Todos los fines de semana toco en espacios como:
 
 • La Fonda Heritage Hotel Luxury,Relais & Châteaux (aquí toco todos los sábados) Marbella.
 • The Rock Hotel, Gibraltar
 • Restaurante Cascada, Marbella
 • Alma de Miguel y The Boab Tree, Estepona
 • Hotel Sunborn Gibraltar 
 • La Lola, Zahara de los Atunes
 • Real Club de Golf Sotogrande.
 • Teatros como los de San Roque Tarifa.
 • Restaurante Marbella Patio, entre muchos otros
 
Mi repertorio incluye tanto composiciones propias de estilo neoclásico como versiones instrumentales de grandes artistas como Ludovico Einaudi, Yann Tiersen, Philip Glass, bandas sonoras, clásicos de Queen o Elton John, y también temas actuales adaptados al piano.
 
 ¿Qué ofrezco?
Una actuación en vivo con piano que crea un ambiente sofisticado, relajado y agradable, ideal para cenas especiales, veladas románticas, celebraciones privadas o simplemente para enriquecer la experiencia de sus comensales.
 
Pueden escucharme y ver vídeos en directo en mis redes sociales como El Vuelo del Navegante (Instagram, YouTube y Facebook), donde ya me siguen miles de personas.
 
 Si desean más información o reservar una fecha, no duden en llamarme directamente al 649 72 96 44.
 
Estoy seguro de que juntos podemos ofrecer una experiencia inolvidable a sus clientes.
 
Muchas gracias por su atención y quedo a su disposición.
 
Un cordial saludo,
 
Sergio Ruiz Valle
 649 72 96 44
 gt.sergiorv@sanroque.es
 Instagram / Facebook / YouTube: El Vuelo del Navegante

Name: Eh Beh Studio
Description:
En Eh Beh Studio, creamos composiciones y producciones musicales personalizadas para proyectos audiovisuales, fusionando lo clásico y lo contemporáneo de forma orgánica y emocional. Trabajamos con instrumentos acústicos reales, capturando su esencia para reforzar la narrativa visual y conectar con la audiencia. Nos especializamos en cine, televisión, documentales y otros proyectos donde el sonido realce la historia. Ofrecemos dos modalidades: álbumes y pistas de música para descarga instantánea, y composición personalizada por encargo, adaptada a las necesidades específicas de cada proyecto. Priorizamos la autenticidad y la innovación, creando experiencias sonoras que amplifican el mensaje y generan una conexión profunda con el espectador.

At Eh Beh Studio, we create personalized compositions and music productions for audiovisual projects, blending the classical and contemporary in an organic and emotional way. We work with real acoustic instruments, capturing their essence to enhance the visual narrative and connect with the audience. We specialize in film, television, documentaries, and other projects where sound amplifies the story. We offer two services: albums and music tracks for instant download, and custom composition on demand, tailored to the specific needs of each project. We prioritize authenticity and innovation, creating sound experiences that amplify the message and foster a deep connection with the viewer.

Name: HafrikPlay
Description:
Hafrikplay – The Home Of New African Music

At Hafrikplay, we started with one clear belief: Africa’s creativity deserves its own stage.

In 2020, we saw the gap—African artists, especially underground and independent ones, had the talent but lacked access to monetization, visibility, and trusted digital infrastructure. Global platforms didn’t understand the local pulse. Monetization was minimal. Distribution was broken. Data? Non-existent.

So, we built Hafrikplay, a pan-African music and content platform tailored for us—for African artists, fans, and music lovers across the continent.

Today, over 50,000+ users and thousands of artists trust us to stream, promote, monetize, and discover music made in Africa, by Africans, for Africans.

Our social mission?
Empower creators. Protect African content. Build tech that prioritizes inclusion, transparency, and prosperity in the creative sector.

We’ve already paid out $40,000+ to artists, launched AI-powered music discovery, and partnered with MTN, Atlas Bank, and DataMellon to fuel creator-driven innovation.

 At Hafrikplay, we’re not just a DSP—we’re the infrastructure powering Africa’s next music revolution.

 Join us. Stream local. Support creatives. Shape the future.

www.hafrikplay.com
#AfricanMusic #CreativeEconomy #StreamingReimagined #SocialImpact

Name: SANTI SAX MUSIC
Description:
Santi Sax transforma cada celebración, boda o evento en una experiencia musical exclusiva e inolvidable. Como saxofonista de eventos y bodas en Madrid y en España, abarca diversos temas, desde melodías románticas hasta ritmos actuales, mezclado, si lo deseas, con música electrónica. Su habilidad para interpretar diversos géneros musicales, desde jazz hasta pop, garantiza que cada momento del evento esté lleno de emoción y encanto.

Además, también organiza conciertos con su grupo musical Santi Sax Music Live Concerts, con su tema «Evolution», un espectáculo musical en Madrid que recorre grandes éxitos, desde los años 80 hasta nuestros días. 
Santi Sax lidera este viaje multisensorial con su saxofón como voz principal. Acompañado de artistas invitados que interpretan canciones icónicas de Whitney Houston, Elton John, Bill Withers, Gregory Porter y Alicia Keys, entre otros. 
La variedad de géneros, desde pop y funk hasta flamenco y música electrónica, asegura una fusión única que cautiva al público.

Name: Sonorama
Description:
En SONORAMA creemos en el poder de la música como vehículo de expresión auténtica y libertad creativa. Somos una empresa independiente de publishing musical, dedicada a impulsar y proteger el talento de compositores y artistas que buscan mantener el control sobre su obra y crecer en la industria musical sin intermediarios que limiten su visión.

Nuestro enfoque combina gestión profesional de derechos de autor, licenciamiento estratégico y promoción personalizada para que cada artista maximice el valor de su música. Trabajamos con transparencia, compromiso y pasión, entendiendo que detrás de cada canción hay una historia única que merece ser escuchada y respetada.

Ofrecemos a nuestros socios acceso a un equipo especializado, redes de distribución globales y oportunidades de sincronización en medios y plataformas digitales, asegurando que su música llegue lejos y genere ingresos justos.

Si eres compositor o artista independiente que busca un aliado confiable para publicar y proteger su música, en SONORAMA  estamos aquí para inspirarte y acompañarte en cada paso del camino.

Name: Más Jazz Magazine
Description:
Más Jazz Magazine es un proyecto destinado a la divulgación y difusión especializada de jazz y música, en activo desde 1998. La revista abarca toda la actualidad de la escena jazzística nacional e internacional: conciertos, entrevistas, reseñas, o crónicas, entre otras. En papel atesora más de cincuenta números, y en la actualidad está potenciando su presencia en el entorno digital.

La revista cuenta con una amplia plantilla de colaboradores y redactores con experiencia en la comunicación musical y en medios culturales. Asimismo, cuenta con la colaboración de diferentes festivales y eventos jazzísticos nacionales e internacionales. 

El objetivo es promover y promocionar diferentes manifestaciones artísticas relacionadas con el jazz, artistas y eventos de la forma más directa, transparente y entretenida, por lo que en este proyecto se da cabida a todas aquellas personas que, de una forma u otra, estén interesadas en participar, tanto en la edición, corrección, o publicación de textos, así como todo lo que engloba la creación de contenido audiovisual y desarrollo de una plataforma de esta índole.

Name: Schedler Music (Rudi Schedler Musikverlag GmbH)
Description:
In January 2005 the Rudi Schedler Music Publishing companies were founded in Austria, Germany and Switzerland.

After working 22 years as managing director at Koch Music Publishing and Universal Music Publishing, Rudi Schedler decided to move to independence after carefully consideration. Two essential reasons were responsible for his decision: Firstly, based on new digital applications the expected effects within the music market. Second, to network closer with authors, artists, producers, managements as well as with national and international publishers.

In 2012, Luis Stuflesser and Rudi Schedler founded the Italian branch – RUDI SCHEDLER EDIZIONI MUSICALI SRL, headquartered in Oritisei.

Thanks to good business contacts and their long music market experience Schedler Music became quickly one of the most prestigious publisher in the German-speaking area.

In the meantime Schedler Music represents many popular foreign catalogues and successful national publishing companies.

Authors, artists and partners are supported by Schedler Music in the placement and exploitation of their titles at record companies, radio- and TV-stations, advertising agencies and film producers. Schedler Music also take care of the correct collection of royalty fees and their balance to authors, artists and partners.

Beyond their membership at the German, Austrian and Swiss author society Schedler Music is also associated with the music publisher federation “Deutscher Musikverlager-Verband (DMV), “Musikverlegerunion Österreich“ and „Schweizerische Vereinigung der Musikverleger (SVMV)“.

Some of the artists we manage includes the likes of Khanyisile Qha, Afrosoul Athi, Younger Ubenzani, Gaffi, BaTee and many others on our catalogue.

Mavala Media Space is arguably the fastest growing and highly sought-after artist management expertise, with just little experience accumulated over the years. The company's aim is develop unknown raw talent to internationally acclaimed superstars. The company is found and run by a collective of young individuals with passion and creative mindset, with the aim to grow to become self made pioneers of South African Music Industry.

Description:

2Mc Editions est une maison d'édition musicale française basée à Anglet, en Nouvelle-Aquitaine. Fondée en 1991 par Jean-Paul Gilles, elle s'est spécialisée dans la publication de partitions et de méthodes pour divers instruments, ainsi que dans la gravure musicale.

Un catalogue riche et varié

La passion de 2Mc Editions pour la musique se traduit dans le soin apporté à chaque publication. La maison d'édition s'engage à proposer des partitions et méthodes de qualité, tant au niveau du contenu que de la présentation.

Un service de gravure musicale

2Mc Editions propose également un service de gravure musicale pour les compositeurs et les arrangeurs. Ce service permet de créer des partitions professionnelles et lisibles, prêtes à être publiées ou interprétées.

Une maison d'édition à l'écoute des musiciens

2Mc Editions est à l'écoute des besoins des musiciens et s'efforce de proposer des ouvrages répondant à leurs attentes. La maison d'édition est également ouverte aux suggestions et aux collaborations avec des auteurs et des compositeurs.

En conclusion, 2Mc Editions est une maison d'édition musicale dynamique et passionnée qui propose un catalogue riche et varié de partitions et de méthodes pour tous les niveaux.

Voici quelques points supplémentaires que vous pouvez mentionner :

2Mc Editions est une entreprise familiale qui s'est construite sur la passion de la musique.
La maison d'édition est attachée à la transmission du savoir et propose des ouvrages pédagogiques de qualité.
2Mc Editions est active dans la promotion de la musique et participe à de nombreux événements musicaux.

Name: The Turkish Harp
Description: The Turkish Harp project aims to disseminate the tradition of Turkish music through the harp, contributing to the instrument’s contemporary identity by making Turkish music accessible to harpists worldwide. By integrating both historical and modern elements, the project aims to bridge the gap between the rich past of Turkish music and its contemporary relevance in the harp world. The Turkish Harp rests on two key foundations. First, it is involved in the revival of the “çeng,” an ancient Near-Eastern harp that had been lost for over 400 years. Second, it works on creating a universal musical language for Turkish music through a critically annotated edition of Turkish music for modern-day harps and harpists, reflecting both the musical style and the deep expressiveness of this tradition. By keeping the memory of the “çeng” alive on modern harps, the project reaches out to harpists, educators, listeners, and music institutions, with the goal of amplifying the presence of Turkish music within the harp world, and ensuring its voice is heard by many.

Name: Canorous Music Publishing
Description:
Canorous Music Publishing (ca·no·rous) is the publishing division of Robinson Music Enterprise, LLC. Founded in 2011 and rebranded as Canorous Music Publishing in 2020, the company reflects more than a decade of experience supporting composers and serving conductors, educators, and performers through thoughtfully curated choral and vocal repertoire.

Originally established as Demetrius Robinson Music Publishing, the rebranding to Canorous Music Publishing marked an intentional expansion of scope and mission. This evolution reflects a commitment to elevating underrepresented compositional voices, strengthening editorial and publishing standards, and developing a sustainable, globally oriented publishing presence. The name Canorous, meaning pleasant sounding, underscores the company’s emphasis on musical integrity, clarity of notation, and expressive craft.

Canorous Music Publishing exists at the intersection of scholarship, artistry, and accessibility. Our mission is to support composers and provide ensembles with music that balances artistic depth, stylistic authenticity, and practical performance needs—ensuring repertoire that is both meaningful and performance-ready.

Leur ambition : professionnaliser leur activité et confronter leur vision artistique aux défis entrepreneuriaux.

Aujourd’hui, le label compte quatre artistes : Sassyam, Owwjay, Tm et Woezon. Ces deux derniers forment également le groupe TmSo, produit par KINTE & SENS.

Name: Agrupación Arcipreste de Hita
Description:
El 23 de abril de 1997, empezó una aventura musical que ha trascendido el espacio y el tiempo: la Agrupación Arcipreste de Hita. Fundada con el objetivo de revivir la magia de la música como un vínculo de unión y fraternidad, esta agrupación no es solo un conjunto de músicos, sino una familia de espíritus aventureros.

En sus orígenes, los miembros de la Agrupación eran estudiantes universitarios con un amor compartido por la música. Ingenieros, médicos, farmacéuticos, abogados, y otras profesiones se embarcaron en un viaje musical que marcó sus años universitarios. Tras un tiempo de caminos separados, el destino nos volvió a unir con un propósito renovado: revivir nuestra pasión por la música y crear vínculos profundos con el público. 

A través de nuestras actuaciones, transformamos eventos y celebraciones en momentos memorables, demostrando que la música es un puente que une
pasiones, revive amistades y celebra la vida en su máxima expresión. Así, continuamos nuestra misión, recordando que todos somos parte de una gran sinfonía de humanidad.

Gracias por apoyanos y seguirnos!

Name: Helicomusic
Description:
Créée en 2004 à Paris, Hélico est une structure à taille humaine fondée par des professionnels passionnés par les musiques et cultures du monde. D'abord label et éditeur, Hélico s’est élargi en intégrant la production de concerts et tournées, ainsi que la production et réalisation de documentaires.

Si elle trouve son origine dans les musiques d'affranchissement (rumba, maloya, capoeira, samba), Hélico s’intéresse aussi aux premiers échanges méditerranéens, aux nouveaux rituels de l’Océan Indien ou à la prise en main de la sono mondiale par l’Afrique. 

Nous travaillons avec des artistes de tous horizons : Brésil, Réunion, Congo RDC, Syrie, Liban, Sénégal, Madagascar, Mali, Cuba, France. Le fil conducteur d’Hélico est de donner aux musiciens les moyens de véhiculer et promouvoir leurs cultures, les accompagner humainement et artistiquement dans le développement de leur carrière.

Nous nous attachons à développer plusieurs  esthétiques (traditionnel, jazz, folk, électro...) tant qu’elles nous plaisent. Défricheuses et innovantes, elles gardent une dimension universelle et une forte identité.

Notre équipe élabore le plus souvent des projets à 360 degrés :  produisant disques, concerts, tournées internationales, vidéos, documentaires, synchronisations. Mais nous accompagnons également des partenaires sur une ou plusieurs de ces activités, comme la production de concerts ou de disques.

Nous prônons un dialogue autour de valeurs humaines et inclusives, cherchant en permanence le point d’équilibre entre travail et vie privée, passion et, moins souvent, raison.

Name: SZ Sugar
Description: SZ Sugar nasce nel 1907 a Milano con il nome di ESZ - Edizioni Suvini Zerboni, come emanazione dell’omonima società teatrale che aveva portato in Italia diverse operette, tra cui “La vedova allegra” di Franz Lehar. Nei decenni successivi, grazie all’impulso del nuovo proprietario Ladislao Sugar, fondatore dell’etichetta discografica Sugar Music, il catalogo della casa editrice si amplia accogliendo, oltre ai classici dell’operetta, il meglio della musica colta contemporanea italiana. Dal 1950 la casa editrice rappresenta diversi compositori come Ennio Morricone, Niccolò Castiglioni, Aldo Clementi, Franco Donatoni, Goffredo Petrassi, Luigi Dallapiccola, Bruno Maderna e Henri Pousseur, spaziando da Ivan Fedele, Alessandro Solbiati, Stefano Gervasoni e Giovanni Verrando, fino a Malika Kishino, Aureliano Cattaneo, Federico Gardella, Riccardo Panfili, Filippo Perocco, fra i tanti.

Name: Caliendo World Music Publishing, LLC
Description:
About Caliendo World Music, LLC 

Caliendo World Music, LLC is an award-winning  sheet music publisher dedicated to enriching the classical music landscape with a vibrant selection of world and ethnic music. For over 25 years, we have empowered students, educators, and virtuoso musicians  with a diverse catalog—ranging from innovative method books  for learners to major sonatas and chamber music for seasoned performers.

Our catalog, proudly represented in the Library of Congress , spans genres including tango , gypsy , flamenco , chamber jazz , western , classical jazz , sacred music , and film scores . Each work is meticulously crafted to enhance performance skills, encourage cultural exploration , and inspire creative interpretation . We believe in the transformative power of music and strive to foster deep engagement with global traditions, helping musicians develop versatility and artistry.

Caliendo World Music is trusted and performed worldwide —embraced by Hollywood luminaries , the Vatican , the United States Air Force , political leaders , symphonic orchestras , and renowned chamber ensembles. Our mission is to provide classical musicians with unparalleled resources that broaden musical horizons and elevate every stage of their artistic journey.

Whether you are a student seeking fresh repertoire , a teacher searching for engaging resources , or a virtuoso looking to expand your musical voice , join our community and experience the world through music.

Name: MJL Piano & Co.
Description:
MJL Piano & Co. offers a wide range of materials for pianists. Founded in 2023, the brand aimed to address the lack of piano resources for the Portuguese-speaking community. Thus, MJL Piano & Co. has become a bridge between cultures and languages, dedicated to spreading the joy of playing the piano to a wider audience. Although most of our resources are currently in Portuguese, we are working on translating them into other languages to ensure inclusivity and accessibility for everyone. At MJL Piano & Co., we prioritise each individual’s learning experience. Our resources are thoughtfully designed to cater to different teaching styles, incorporating both traditional and contemporary approaches. We understand the challenges of learning the piano and are committed to maintaining motivation and enthusiasm throughout the learning journey. Ultimately, MJL Piano & Co. aims to foster a genuine interest, motivation, and dedication to music, empowering pianists to freely explore and enjoy the piano while pursuing their own musical interests.

Description:
Pro21Cultural és una empresa creada a València a l’any 2000, dedicada a la producció musical i d’arts escèniques. Els seus fundadors provenen del camp de la gestió cultural i del sector públic.

Pro21cultural ha vingut desenvolupant el seu treball en l’àmbit musical gestionant les gires de grups com Orxata, Aspencat, Vadebo, Atupa, Frida, Sant Gatxo, Sva-ters, Soul Atac, VerdCel, Dóna’m Jazz, en l’actualitat realitzem el management de grups com El Diluvi, La Fúmiga, Sandra Monfort, Maluks, Niuss, Tito Pontet, Colomet i el booking de les Marala, Oques Grasses, Els Catarres, Buhos, Els Amics de les Arts  i Maria del Mar Bonet,

Pro21Cultural és l’organitzadora i productora de diversos festivals com el Festival Pops Marítims portem la direcció artística del  Festival Nits al Castell de Xàtiva i organitzem junt al VAM des del 2013 la Fira Valenciana de la Música el Trovam! a Castelló.

En el món del teatre, portem la direcció artística del Festival Sagunt a Escena i som distribuïdors de la  companyia Pont Flotant, a més d’haver distribuït companyies com Toni Albà, Francachela Teatre, Destil·ladors de Somnis, Oscura Teatre, , Lupa Teatre, Trinchera Teatral i Teatrencompanyia.

En el camp de la dansa actualment duem a terme la distribució de Cristina Gómez i hem treballat anys enrere amb Christine Cloux i Clara Barberà, Asun Noales i Arantxa Sagardoy en l’etapa de Patas Arriba.

En allò referent a la gestió d’espais, la temporada 2010- 2011 vam programar el Teatre Micalet de València i des del 2012 gestionem colze a colze amb l’ajuntament i Departament de Cultura el Teatre Calderón d’Alcoi.

Participem en les fires del sector com el Mercat de Música Viva de Vic, la Fira Mediterrània de Manresa i la Fira B! de Balears, a més de Bime, PrimaveraPro, Womex, FiraTàrrega, Temporada Alta, Mostra de Teatre d’Alcoi, Mercartes entre d’altres.

Name: Power Music Group
Description:
Who is PMG Music 

PMG is a consultant and independent A&R company that specializes in providing global opportunism through music. Our non-exclusive, open-ended deals give artists flexibility and also show’s our fearlessness to deliver what we promise. We recruit a diverse roster of talent that’s driven to make good music and want to see a return on investment by signing deals and/or getting placements.

The Music Industry Trust Our Quality

Through our relationships with music industry personnel: record companies, publishers, and music supervisors,TV and film, and advertising agencies; our songwriters and artists are a phone call away from being discovered. Our small team of professional A&R’s knows what it takes to be a successful songwriter/artist and are intuitive with the selection on talent brought in.

Three Ways We Do Business

We get the listing details and let our roster of artists know what type of music they’re searching for, once artist submits their material, we screen it and if approved we send it to the company requesting material. 

We get the request, and then create writing teams to work on projects together which maybe in different countries and/or states, A&R provide music, team creates industry ready demo and is submitted to company requesting material.   

We work with industry professional site to recruit talent and may occasionally accept unsolicited material. Artist or songwriters looking to join the team may submit through our PRO’s and/or PMG Music is accepting unsolicited material.

Welcome to Allegro Press — where classical tradition meets creative innovation. At Allegro Press, we’re passionate about helping musicians connect more deeply with their craft through thoughtfully designed products and resources. Founded by musicians, for musicians, we specialize in providing high-quality arranged sheet music, educational content, and digital tools that support both learning and performance.

Our growing library includes carefully crafted solo, chamber, and ensemble arrangements, designed with attention to detail and playability. Whether you're a student or a seasoned performer, you'll find music that’s engaging, expressive, and performance-ready. All of our products are available through our secure and easy-to-use online platform, making high-quality classical music resources more accessible to musicians around the world.

We believe in making classical music more accessible, approachable, and adaptable to modern musicians’ lives. With a background in performance, education, and digital content creation, our team is dedicated to offering tools that not only preserve the beauty of the classical tradition but also invite innovation, curiosity, and personal expression.

Description:
Prism : Un guichet unique pour les artistes indépendants

Prism est une structure innovante conçue pour accompagner les artistes autoproduits dans leur développement musical.  Nous proposons une gamme complète de services regroupés au sein d'une entité unique, permettant aux artistes de :
- Développer leurs projets à leur rythme
- Conserver leur indépendance artistique
- Garder le contrôle total sur leur carrière

Prism agit comme un prisme à facettes multiples, offrant un large éventail de services qui répondent aux différents besoins des artistes, de la création à la distribution.

En choisissant Prism, les artistes bénéficient de plusieurs avantages :
- Facilité et gain de temps : Plus besoin de chercher des services à différents endroits. Prism centralise tout ce dont un artiste a besoin.
- Autonomie et liberté : Les artistes gardent le contrôle créatif et prennent les décisions concernant leur musique.
- Flexibilité et accompagnement : Prism s'adapte au rythme de chaque artiste et propose un soutien personnalisé tout au long de leur parcours.

Prism a pour objectif de transformer l'industrie musicale en offrant aux artistes autoproduits les ressources et l'accompagnement nécessaires pour réussir tout en restant fidèles à leur vision artistique.

Description:
Welcome to "We for Music," a leading organization dedicated to empowering the music industry through diversity and education. Our team of cultural advocates, musicians, and business professionals is passionate about using the power of music to connect people worldwide and promote diverse creative and cultural sectors.

We envision a world where music celebrates diversity and inspires positive social change. Through our work, we aim to support and nurture the next generation of music professionals and promote the richness and beauty of diverse musical traditions from around the world.

Name: Böhm & Sohn
Description:
Böhm & Sohn Musikverlag GmbH – Tradition seit 1803. Heute digitaler Publisher für Kompositionen unterschiedlichster Stile, Sparten und Epochen.

Böhm & Sohn blickt auf eine beeindruckende Tradition zurück: Gegründet 1803 in Augsburg, zählt unser Haus zu den ältesten Musikverlagen Europas, bis heute immer noch familiär und besonders inhabergeprägt.
Über 200 Jahre haben wir uns auf weltliche und geistliche Chormusik sowie die Kirchenmusik konzentriert – dieser klassischer Kern bleibt lebendig.
Seit 2022 setzen wir auf eine zukunftsgerichteten Strategie: Wir erweitern unser Repertoire um vielfältige musikalische Genres und digitalisieren unser Angebot konsequent. Der entscheidende Schritt: Print-on-Demand macht rund 12.000 seltene oder vergriffene Werke wieder verfügbar – im eigenen Online-Shop, über Grossisten und den Musikalienhandel sowie mit der Expertise unseres Partners Ancora.
Unsere Mission: Bewährte musikalische Tradition bewahren und um Neues anreichern – und sie digital und zuverlässig unseren internationalen Handelspartnern und den Musiker:innen aus aller Welt zugänglich machen.

Name: Tango Transcriptions for Everyone
Description:
I am Lucas Alcides Cáceres, a violinist and tango composer. I also hold a degree in Argentinian Music from UNSAM (Buenos Aires). For more information, music, and videos, you can visit my website. This here is my project "Tango Transcriptions for Everyone": here you will find completely free educational material that I have created for studying tango, mostly in the form of transcriptions made by myself. None of these transcriptions are paid nor will they ever be. You just need to sign up for the Free Membership and you can already access them!

There are many Paid Membership options, to meet all needs and possibilities. The transcriptions, corrections, electricity for the computer, food, and patience are all on me haha, so any contribution is very welcome. Additionally, in certain memberships, you get exclusive benefits (original notation files, videos, voting, and more).

I hope this humble material is useful to you and the musicians around you!

*español*

Soy Lucas Alcides Cáceres, violinista y compositor de tango. También soy Licenciado en Música Argentina en la UNSAM (Buenos Aires). Para más info, música y videos, podés visitar mi web. Esto aquí es mí proyecto Desgrabaciones de Tango para Todxs: acá vas a encontrar material pedagógico completamente gratuito qué he creado para el estudio del tango, la mayor parte en forma de transcripciones realizadas por mí mismo. Ninguna de estas desgrabaciones es paga ni lo va a ser jamás. Solo tenés que sumarte a la Suscripción Gratuita y ya podés acceder!

Hay muchas opciones de Suscripciones de Pago, para todas las necesidades y posibilidades. Las transcripciones, las correcciones, la electricidad para la computadora, la comida y la paciencia corren todas por mi cuenta jaja, por lo que cualquier aporte es muy bienvenido. Además, en ciertas membresías obtenés beneficios exclusivos (archivos de notación originales, videos, votaciones y más).

Name: Mayvibe
Description:
Mayvibe is Africa's leading platform for music monetization, promotion, and distribution, empowering artists to take control of their music careers. We help musicians monetize their content effectively while connecting directly with fans for financial support. Our innovative approach removes traditional barriers, enabling well-wishers, supporters, and fans to contribute to the success of their favorite artists.

Our Unique Value Proposition

Unlike traditional platforms, Mayvibe allows artists to sell their songs and albums directly to their fans, cutting out the middleman. This direct-to-fan model ensures that musicians retain more of their earnings while fostering a deeper, more personal connection with their audience. Single tracks are sold for 1,500 Naira per download, and albums for 3,000 Naira per download.

In addition to selling directly on Mayvibe, we help artists distribute their music to over 100+ digital stores, including major platforms like Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube, TikTok, Shazam, Tidal, Boomplay, Facebook, Instagram, and Snapchat. Artists can also receive payments directly into their local bank accounts, ensuring seamless financial transactions.

Our Mission

At Mayvibe, we’re dedicated to transforming the music industry by offering artists the tools they need to thrive. With simple monetization strategies and fan-funding opportunities, we bridge the gap between creativity and financial success.

Why Choose Mayvibe?

Direct Sales Model: Keep more of your earnings by selling directly to your fans.
Wide Distribution Reach: Distribute your music to 100+ digital platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, and more.
Monetization Made Simple: Retain more revenue with our artist-friendly pricing structure.
Global Reach: Promote your music to a worldwide audience.
Direct Fan Engagement: Build a strong connection with your fans and receive direct support.
Local Bank Payments: Get paid directly into your local bank account.
Join us now!

Description:
Not composing until leaving a 24-year career as a full-time multi-instrumentalist musician, arranger/orchestrator in the Royal Australian Navy Band, and staff member at the tri-Service Defence Force School of Music, Kara’s music was quickly picked up for publication. Her extensive performing and transcribing/arranging history underpins her work and interest in writing for bands particularly. Inspired by traditional and emerging band repertoire, jazz, musicals, film, and a wide array of orchestral and chamber music, Kara aims to write narrative-filled, melodic music that is engaging and comfortably familiar but unmistakably her. 

Kara’s compositions and arrangements have been performed in Australia and overseas, and she has received formal recognition for her entries in composition and arranging competitions, acceptance as a member of the Music Arranger’s Guild of Australia and works listed as band competition test pieces.

Nacido y criado en Colombia, inició su carrera en 2007, presentándose en diversos bares, clubes, eventos y festivales locales. Durante los últimos 15 años, ha sido residente en reconocidos lugares de música electrónica y alternativa en Bogotá, incluyendo las míticas discotecas "Armando Records", "El Coq Bar" y "Kaputt Club". A nivel nacional ha compartido su talento en Medellín, Barraquilla, Cartagena, Santa Marta, Bucaramanga, Ibagué, Neiva entre otras ciudades e internacionalmente en Floyd Miami, el Patio Wynwood,  Mono, Rhodesia en CDMX, en Oaxaca y Tulum. 

Ha tenido el privilegio de participar en festivales locales como el Festival Estéreo Picnic, Rock al Parque y el Festival de Verano de Bogotá, compartiendo escenario con artistas de renombre como Claptone, Rüfüs du Sol, Capital Cities, Miami Horror, Bag Raiders, Thieves Like Us, Kygo, Hercules and The Love Affair, Toro y Moi, Digitaria, Instituto Mexicano del Sonido, Fred Falke, Hardwell, Martin Garrix y John Acquaviva. En 2022, se presentó junto a Fatboy Slim y fue invitado al cartel oficial del escenario Budweiser en el Festival Estéreo Picnic 2023.

Name: Billboard Africa
Description: Billboard is the ultimate barometer of success in music. Since its origin in 1894, music leaders and fans across the world look to Billboard as the most trusted source for music information, spanning more than a dozen countries and published in 10 languages. The prestigious Billboard Music Awards are the only premium awards ceremony that recognize musicians for their undeniable achievements on the Billboard charts, using pure data to determine the winners, rather than relying on opaque committees or undisclosed voters to select the honorees giving fans maximum impact at each year's ceremony, as Billboard's chart data measures fans' engagement with their favorite music. Name: St. James Music Press
Description:
Since 1992 St. James Music Press has been publishing some of the finest church anthems being written today. THE FINEST! And we're not just bragging. Anthems from SJMP have been heard on national broadcasts, performed at cathedrals and churches throughout the world, and premiered at major music conferences throughout the country. Our catalog does not contain praise-songs, choruses or renewal music. It is, however, filled with new traditional anthems, beautiful classics, and fresh arrangements of varying difficulty which have been tried and tested by many fine church choirs.

Need an anthem for the third Sunday after Epiphany when your entire alto section has decided to go on a "spiritual makeover" weekend hosted by Noylene Fabergé, the Christian Beautician? No problem. It's only a couple of mouse-clicks away.

We want you to download and copy our music!   One affordable annual membership offers unlimited downloads, learning tracks, children’s music, St. Martin’s Psalter, liturgical planning tools and the license to stream. Whew! 

Find the Sunday in our Liturgical calendar, look for the voicing you need, listen to a few, and print out some that you like. Or print them all. Then photocopy enough for your choir (permission granted!) and they'll sound like a waffle-house full of angels with Gabriel serving pancakes!

Blending electronic music, design, fashion, and visual storytelling, XX LAB crafts curated experiences that go beyond traditional label formats—releasing music, objects, and immersive events with a strong artistic vision.

Since its launch, XX LAB has released cutting-edge works by François X, Mac Declos, Elise Massoni, Ryan James Ford, and VEL—building a catalogue that speaks to a new generation of club culture and beyond.

Whether through high-impact releases, collectible merchandise, or curated physical installations, XX LAB bridges sound and design to create lasting cultural value.

Description:
Our mission is simple: to provide affordable, high-quality choral music for digital download, while offering fair royalties to our composers and arrangers.  

As a company founded by choir directors, we understand the unique challenges that come with finding the perfect repertoire for ordinary choirs. Our pieces are designed to challenge and inspire without being unmanageable or dull. We work with a diverse range of experienced composers who are singers and choir directors themselves, ensuring our catalogue is filled with music that works for real people in real settings.

At Choral Music Publishing, we are committed to providing choirs of all shapes and sizes with music that inspires and excites. We're here to help your choir find the perfect piece for your next programme.

Name: Back Music
Description:
En Back Music creemos que una marca no solo se ve: también se escucha.

Y cuando el sonido no está bien pensado, pasa lo que ya conoces: música genérica, dudas con las licencias y horas perdidas intentando que todo encaje.

Por eso creamos una librería musical diferente.
Una donde el ritmo es latino, la identidad es clara y la música ya viene lista para usarse.

Aquí encuentras microjingles diseñados para marcas, campañas y contenido digital. No para rellenar silencios, sino para reforzar mensajes, generar recuerdo y darle coherencia sonora a lo que comunicas.

Cada pieza está creada con intención, estructura profesional y licencias claras, para que puedas usarla con tranquilidad desde el primer clic. Sin ediciones eternas. Sin letra pequeña. 

Trabajamos para agencias, marketers, creadores y marcas que entienden que el sonido también comunica.

Que saben que un buen audio no compite con el mensaje: lo potencia.

Si buscas música latina con criterio, lista para acompañar tu contenido y respaldada por una licencia clara, este es tu lugar.

Es momento de "volver a la música". 
Y de dejar que tu marca suene como debe.

 Explora nuestra librería y encuentra el sonido que necesitas     https://backmusicstudio.com/

Name: MUSIC CURATOR
Description:
A diferencia de quienes hacen playlists con canciones sueltas, nosotros elegimos las correctas para cada cliente y diseñamos secuencias musicales en bloque, con transiciones suaves y armónicas que generan atmósferas continuas, sin cortes ni interrupciones. 
En lugar de funcionar como una lista de canciones que suenan al azar, nuestra programación reproduce los bloques musicales en orden aleatorio cada día y se renuevan mensualmente, lo que permite mantener la frescura sin perder coherencia. Y si lo deseas, integramos en el audio el nombre de tu marca, para que tus clientes reconozcan que esa música fue creada solo para ti.
El servicio que entregamos es verdaderamente personalizado, no utilizamos algoritmos para seleccionar canciones de forma automática, todo lo que suena ha sido elegido por personas reales, con sensibilidad curatorial y criterio profesional.

Name: Rawgland Entertainment (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Rawgland Entertainment (Proprietary) Limited, is a record label that focuses on what is important; investing in the music and talented artists that create it. We believe in creating a collaborative and innovative environment where our artist can thrive and reach their maximum potential in a stress free atmosphere.

Our vision is to be a renowned, world-class recording company that caters for all the needs of its artists and members.

Our mission is to create a home for art and individuals passionate about their craft.

We are one team, with one vision, and one goal. We work together as one collective unit, producing all styles of great music.

The company evolved from an artist that was fed up with greedy records labels to create an organization that encourages creativity, community, and an environment where artists can work on their music freely without distraction or concern.

Everything was made official on the 27th of October 2014 and piece by piece we put together a management team who understands the industry and our role as a recording company that has a vested interest in helping our artists grow and advance their careers.

We pride ourselves as being a youthful and forward thinking recording company that embraces innovation, takes advantage of cutting-edge Internet strategies and international our network of affiliates , while still understanding the invaluable knowledge we can gain from industry veterans.

We are about maintaining uncompromising core values by focusing on providing the resources and services needed so our artists can focus on their music. We reinvest everything into developing new talent for the love of the music.

We remain focused on our role as a support network for our artists.
We are an environment where great music, great minds, and great energy meet.

Name: JotChord
Description:
JotChord is a web application for authoring of charts for musical performance, published in the Nashville Number System (NNS) style. Used by studio session musicians, individual performing musicians, musical directors (MDs), worship musicians and leaders, and music teachers, JotChord saves you time, enables rapid changes, and allows easy sharing of charts as PDFs.

Unlike traditional methods for creating PDF-formatted NNS charts (MS Word, Google Docs, Adobe Acrobat), JotChord allows you to type the chord numbers and common symbols directly into a document, without having to navigate menus and toolbars. For example a diamond-on-the-one would be represented as: <1>

JotChord auto-generates a PDF on the fly with every character and symbol you add to the chart, so it's truly WYSIWYG.

Name: Dulcamara Press
Description:
We work to increase diversity and representation in classical music through the publication and promotion of both historical and contemporary classical music by composers from underrepresented populations.

Our goal is to facilitate the performance and awareness of music that has been overlooked, neglected, or otherwise unavailable. We are passionate about music by underrepresented composers from all historical eras, new music by living composers, and early music that has been previously unpublished or only available in scholarly editions with limited accessibility to performers.

Every edition from Dulcamara Press is researched with scholarly rigor and edited with meticulous care. Our scores are thoughtfully designed for clarity, readability, and practical performance use. Each score is printed on high-quality paper and hand-sewn in a durable, lay-flat binding that is made to last. Our beautiful designs, high quality printing and binding, and careful attention to notational nuance, page-turns, and readability make Dulcamara editions a pleasure to use for both performance and study.

Name: Random Noize Musick
Description:
Random Noize Musick GmbH is an independent music publishing company based in Berlin, founded in 2006 by Marco Haas (aka T.Raumschmiere), Florian Schmieg, and Daniel Meteo. Originating from the merger of key electronic music labels such as Shitkatapult, Musick, and Meteosound, the company has established itself as a hub for forward-thinking and uncompromised sound.

The catalog features a diverse roster of renowned artists including Apparat, Moderat, Anika, Pilocka Krach, Oval, and T.Raumschmiere, spanning genres from experimental electronic to punk-infused techno. Works published by Random Noize Musick have been featured in global ad campaigns, film trailers, and acclaimed series like Breaking Bad and Dark, with placements and nominations at the GRAMMYs, Venice Film Festival, and VIA Indie Awards.

In 2024, Random Noize Musick signed a long-term administration agreement with Bosworth Music, part of Wise Music Group, expanding its international reach and joining forces with its sister company, Random Musick Publishing GmbH.

Name: East Cork Early Music Festival
Description:
The East Cork Early Music Festival promotes and develops historically-informed (early) music performance in Cork city and county.
East Cork Early Music Festival was established in 2003 by internationally-renowned viol player Sarah Cunningham and Irish early musician Douglas Gunn in collaboration with Cork County Council Arts Office and later the Arts Council. Since its inception, the festival has made high-quality music accessible to all audiences, through the unique accessibility of early music that shares qualities with the best of classical, folk and improvised music.

Our vision is an Ireland where early music is appreciated by audiences of all ages and backgrounds throughout the country and artists specialising in this music are developed and nurtured.  We aim to integrate the authentic style and spirit of an earlier time with performances which are vital and coherent in the present.

Name: deepdive records
Description:
DEEPDIVE MUSIC is a Swiss music agency offering comprehensive support for emerging talents from Switzerland and abroad in the areas of management, concert booking, promotion, publishing, and events. The company focuses on a close collaboration with its artists to define the best strategies to help their careers whilst being mindful of their individual needs.

Founded in 1999 by Stefan Schurter, DEEPDIVE MUSIC has been a vital force in the musical landscape of Switzerland ever since. From the very first, Schurter’s main passion has been the discovery and development of talented new voices. Well over thirty acts have enjoyed the benefits of his experience and vision so far. The current portfolio of DEEPDIVE MUSIC includes three outstanding artists - Veronica Fusaro, Arthur Henry and Mira Lora.

In the early days, DEEPDIVE MUSIC was strongly involved in live music, organising around 400 concerts a year and bringing the likes of Billy Talent, Biffy Clyro, Gabriella Cilmi, De La Soul, Amplifier and Zoot Woman to Switzerland. Stefan Schurter also played a key role behind the scenes of a number of popular festivals, booking artists such as Ziggy Marley, Shaggy, Patrice, Toots and the Maytals and Busy Signal.

For the past ten years, DEEPDIVE MUSIC has focussed primarily on the management and promotion of new artists in Switzerland, and on devising and coordinating their international marketing campaigns. To this end, CEO Stefan Schurter founded the label DEEPDIVE RECORDS and the music publishing company DEEPDIVE PUBLISHING. The latest releases have all broken into the top 20 of the Swiss album charts, including four top 10 placings.

For the past eight years, Stefan Schurter has worked very closely with the singer/songwriter Veronica Fusaro. During this time, Fusaro has played more than 600 concerts, released three EPs and reached the top 5 with her debut album. "It's a marathon, not a sprint." says Schurter. “Success does not come overnight. It requires years of hard work

Name: The Velvet Folio
Description:
The Velvet Folio is an exclusive collection of limited edition Baroque and Renaissance-inspired music and art. Based in London, United Kingdom.

Our portfolio currently offers a musical work in the style of Baroque musician Johann Sebastian Bach (1685-1750), and a Renaissance-inspired artwork:

- Anthony Daly: Christmas Oratorio, ADW 10 (2021, £850,000)
Written for Baroque orchestra and choir with soloists, this work, after Bach's Christmas Oratorio BWV 248, is an original by Anthony Daly, composed in 2021, and written in authentic Baroque contrapuntal style. It can be performed on period or modern instruments if desired, and is 34 minutes in duration (114 pages). No performances or recordings of the work have taken place, and the work will be provided with a signed certificate of authenticity and original score, as one of only 7 copies to be produced worldwide.

- Maria Daly: Rustic Elegance (2025, A3, £250,000)
Rustic Elegance is a Renaissance-inspired original acrylic artwork piece by artist Maria Daly. The work contrasts the subjects against a dark black background; a style exemplified in the works of Italian Renaissance painter Michelangelo Merisi da Caravaggio (1571-1610). This work displays a unique and captivating blend of Renaissance and modern aesthetic. The painting will be supplied with a black frame and is A3 in size (11.7x16.5 in). Only one copy of the artwork will ever be produced.

Welcome to AraBeatz, a melting pot of musical passion and cultural fusion, where Skore 16 and El Rey, two dynamic individuals with diverse backgrounds, unite their love for music. Skore 16, a Saudi who grew up in the rich musical tapestry of France, and El Rey, a French talent nurtured in the vibrant musical landscape of Saudi Arabia, infuse their distinct perspectives into every beat, production, and jingle. Step into our studio, where the alchemy of cultures meets a state-of-the-art musical haven. AraBeatz specializes in crafting beats that resonate with a global audience, producing music that tells stories beyond boundaries, and creating jingles that capture the essence of brands with international flair. At AraBeatz, we understand that music is a universal language, and our studio is the canvas where diverse influences converge. Skore 16 and El Rey's collaborative synergy ensures that each project is a journey of creativity, blending the best of French finesse and Saudi soul. Whether you're an artist looking for a distinctive sound, a band seeking to amplify your identity, or a business in need of a culturally resonant jingle, AraBeatz is your destination. Our commitment is not just to create music but to curate an experience that reflects the rich tapestry of Skore 16 and El Rey's musical journey. 
Our Vision in AraBeatz, it's where cultural boundaries dissolve, and the language of music speaks volumes. Let's create something extraordinary together!

Name: Iron Avantgarde Publishing GmbH
Description:
Iron Avantgarde Publishing: Building a Future for Artists

Founded in 2010, Iron Avantgarde Publishing was created to fill a gap in music rights management. The idea stemmed from the realization that many musicians and songwriters struggled with the complex processes of collecting societies like GEMA. Iron Avantgarde aimed to be more than just another music publisher; it sought to be a company that actively defends artists‘ rights and ensures they are fairly compensated for their work.

Expansion: A Holistic Approach

Over the years, Iron Avantgarde expanded its portfolio and offered comprehensive consulting services. With signings of genre greats like Monster Magnet, Alestorm, Gloryhammer, Jinjer, Visions of Atlantis, and Candlemass, as well as the Burning Witches, Hammerfall, Nile, Wind Rose, or Nervosa, a renowned roster was quickly built up.

Today, Iron Avantgarde Publishing stands as a leading company in music rights management, relying on strong relationships and technical expertise to help artists get the most out of their creative work.

Name: Indeee Records
Description:
Indeee Records is a music publishing start-up that launched in January 2022 with the goal of promoting and supporting independent music artists in India. Founded by a group of passionate individuals who recognized the lack of opportunities for upcoming music artists in the country, Indeee Records has already made significant strides in its short time since its inception.

The company is dedicated to providing a platform for independent music artists to showcase their talent and connect with their audience. Indeee Records focuses on supporting musicians across the genres and languages, from classical to contemporary, and from Hindi to regional languages.

The start-up has also partnered with local music venues and festivals to promote its artists and showcase their music.  Indeee Records' commitment to independent music is evident in its approach to working with its artists. The company provides its artists with a wide range of services, including music production, distribution, marketing, and promotion. The start-up also helps artists secure licensing deals and monetize their music through various channels.

To promote its artists and connect with its audience, Indeee Records has a strong presence on various social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and YouTube. The start-up regularly posts updates about its artists, new releases, and upcoming events, keeping its followers engaged and informed.

Looking forward, Indeee Records plans to continue its focus on supporting independent music artists in India. The start-up aims to sign up more artists, release more music, and partner with more music venues and festivals to promote its artists. The company also plans to expand its presence internationally, promoting Indian independent music to a global audience.

Overall, Indeee Records is a promising start-up that is making a significant impact on the independent music scene in India.

Name: Mockingbird Publishing Group, LLC
Description:
Mockingbird Publishing Group, LLC (MBPG) MBPG  has multiple catalogs from established artists covering several genres of music styles, as well as target independent publishing companies.  https://www.mbird.pub/

Mockingbird is the brainchild of 40 year music industry executive, Paul Korzilius, who wanted to form a world-class team to take advantage of the thousands of clients looking to sell or partially sell their catalogs.

With a clear objective to create a platform powered by a proprietary program for enhancing a catalog, Paul began the journey in 2020 to develop a team unlike any other in the industry today. First and foremost he had to select the very best business and development people with strong music industry backgrounds. He knew that artificial intelligence had become a major influence in today’s business sector and felt that it could play a major role in the way catalogs are valued, enhanced, and protected. First, he found a major financial industry expert with great AI technical skills and added him to the company. Next, he had to find the right actuarial team who could access the major funds necessary to acquire catalogs. This allows for a different perspective on how to learn from the past to predict the future.

Unlike other publishers, Mockingbird’s efforts center around songwriter advocacy. Mockingbird partners with artists and includes them in the upside of overall company profits.

Paul Korzilius, CEO. Paul is a widely successful senior Entertainment and Sports executive with 40 years in the business. Over his career, Paul has been responsible for the success of some of the biggest selling albums and tours in music history. Clients have included Queen, Cheap Trick, Cher, Bon Jovi, Scorpions, Debbie Gibson, and The Alarm. Paul was the recipient of Billboard Magazine’s 2013 Manager of the Year as well as Producer or Executive Producer on a dozen long form music TV productions.

Name: PianoJams Publishing
Description:
At PianoJams, we create high-quality piano sheet music from your favorite movies, TV shows and video games soundtracks.

As a publisher and curator, we're committed to producing musical content with a strong presence on social media platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok...) to engage an active community of music enthusiasts.

At PianoJams, we deeply value our partnerships with esteemed music publishers and various multimedia productions. Our commitment is to furnish music enthusiasts with authorized sheet music from the most recent releases, meticulously reviewed and sanctioned by the original composers. We're not merely about providing music; we're about creating a collaborative platform that bridges the gap between studios, composers, artists, and fans.

We firmly uphold the notion that sheet music plays an instrumental role in perpetuating the reach and influence of a cultural piece. Be it a soundtrack from a blockbuster movie, a memorable tune from a popular show, or a melody from the latest web series, the ability to play and share these compositions enhances their longevity and appeal.

By making these musical scores accessible, we help amplify the impact and resonance of these works, fostering a community that appreciates and participates in the continued spread of cultural art. At PianoJams, we're not only sharing music - we're spreading culture, one note at a time.

Eld Media Productions actively engages in global community empowerment through the deployment of cutting-edge technologies, focused on sustainability and future-forward solutions. The income generated from our custom and entertainment music, is reinvested into providing these technologies and educational resources at no cost. This approach ensures that communities worldwide are equipped with the tools and expertise necessary to foster growth, innovation, and sustainability for generations to come.

Together, we can create harmony—not only through the art of music but by fostering a life that is in alignment with both personal and global well-being.

*Welcome to Gangstar Records: Where Music Meets Innovation*
In the ever-evolving landscape of the music industry, Gangstar Records stands at the forefront of innovation and creativity. As a premier music production studio, we are dedicated to crafting exceptional music experiences that inspire, uplift, and entertain.
*Our Mission*
At Gangstar Records, we believe that music has the power to transform and uplift. Our mission is to empower artists and brands to tell their stories through music, and to create a global community that celebrates creativity and self-expression.

Our team of expert producers, engineers, and musicians have years of experience in the music industry, working with artists from diverse genres. We are passionate about music and dedicated to delivering top-notch music production services that exceed our clients' expectations.

The Deppsi is a boundary-breaking music project that blends sounds from every corner of the world — from pop, dance, and R&B to rap, classic, rock, and swing. La Asociación Cultural Fenômeno Records pretende ser un centro de educación, divulgación, experimentación y creación artística. Es una propuesta de carácter colectivo que pretende ser un movimiento de resistencia contra la centralización de la cultura en las grandes ciudades para ser reapropiada por las provincias y sus pueblos, zonas históricamente desprovistas de instituciones que la apoyen.

La Asociación, en colaboración con el Ayuntamiento de Pedro Muñoz ha generado una una comunidad joven, fuerte y creativa capaz de generar por ella misma una cultura adaptada a su situación social y demográfica.

Our team is dedicated to curate and promote media use of the compositions of our clients, from the works of contracted composers to wholly-owned song catalogues. The goal is to be an ethic, transparent and dynamic administrator of our clients work, representing their interests with friendly contracts, royalty collection, administration, and reclaiming, while offering a worldwide sync network.

Name: Eurindia Edizioni SNC
Description:
Eurindia Edizioni SNC è una casa editrice musicale con sede in Ticino, specializzata nella creazione e distribuzione di spartiti originali per cori, orchestre e cantanti. La nostra missione è arricchire il panorama musicale con composizioni ispirate al tango, alla musica neo latina americana e alla musica classica, con un focus particolare sulla qualità e sull'autenticità artistica.

Oltre alla nostra produzione editoriale, siamo impegnati nella diffusione della cultura e della consapevolezza del tango. Offriamo un corso online unico nel suo genere, che esplora i segreti del tango attraverso la guida dei più rinomati esperti mondiali del genere. Coniughiamo la passione per la musica e la formazione per offrire un’esperienza immersiva a musicisti e appassionati.

Siamo un punto di riferimento per chi desidera esplorare le radici e le innovazioni del tango e della musica classica latino-americana, unendo tradizione e innovazione con uno sguardo verso il futuro della musica.

Name: El Hierofante
Description:
El Hierofante Studio es un espacio de creación sonora donde la sensibilidad artística y la técnica profesional se encuentran para dar vida a la música que realmente conecta.

Fundado por Rodrigo Aranda —productor musical, bajista y multiinstrumentista con más de 20 años en la industria— El Hierofante acompaña a bandas, solistas y proyectos audiovisuales en todo su proceso creativo: desde la preproducción y arreglos, hasta la mezcla, el mastering y la producción musical completa.

 Rodrigo fue bajista de Six Magics, banda con la que giró por Europa en 2015 junto a los alemanes Axxis, llevando su música a escenarios internacionales. En estudio, ha trabajado como productor en Miut, colaborando con artistas como Veró, y componiendo para documentales como Intensamente Violeta, Génesis, y Niños Rosados y Niñas Azules.

 En El Hierofante, cada canción se trata como una obra única. Nuestra filosofía no se basa en plugins mágicos, sino en decisiones conscientes y criterio musical. Nos especializamos en transformar grabaciones hechas incluso en home studio en obras pulidas, sin perder la esencia de quien las creó.

 También desarrollamos contenido educativo para músicos emergentes, enseñando cómo mejorar sus demos, grabar mejor desde casa y entender la producción sin caer en tecnicismos vacíos.

Basado en Chile, con alma global. Si tu proyecto necesita un partner creativo que entienda el corazón de tu música y te acompañe en cada paso, aquí estamos.

Name: Sicuramente bella
Description:
Ciao, siamo Together: un’agenzia creativa, un partner media, una casa di produzione — e molto altro ancora.
Crediamo nel cambiamento generato dalla forza delle idee, immaginando un mondo migliore in cui fare business sia un processo sano e sostenibile.

Pur operando in un settore profondamente umano, infatti, ci rendiamo troppo spesso conto di quanto l’umanità venga messa in secondo piano.
Noi pensiamo invece che esista un altro modo di fare impresa: più etico, ambizioso e generativo.
Dove il profitto non è solo economico, ma anche culturale e sociale.
Dove l’ambizione è gentile, l’agonismo è sano e la leggerezza autentica.

Per questo, insieme ai brand, sviluppiamo strategie rilevanti e idee coraggiose, unendo dati, cultura e creatività per lasciare una +creative footprint e generare un impatto positivo nella società.
